_comment: Disallowed terms in officer-supplied free text (raid team names + labels) and Twitch channel logins. Matched case-insensitively after normalising the input (NFKC, leetspeak-folded, spacing/invisible chars stripped) so 'p0rn' / 'f a g g o t' are caught. A hit rejects the save and reports to admins (audit_log). Re-read on every check — edits take effect without a restart. Avoid adding terms that are common English substrings — matching is substring-based.
